zh.Tunbridge Wells, Kent, England: 英國肯特坦布利其 威爾斯
zh.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, Unite: 英國威爾斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adeliza Meschines de Chester於1099年出生在法國諾門迪時，她的父親Ranulf Meschin30歲，母親Lucy of Bolingbroke33歲。她和Richard FitzGilbert de Clare至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1128年在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年29歲。

zh-hans.Tunbridge Wells, Kent, England: 英国肯特坦布利其 威爾斯
zh-hans.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, Unite: 英国威尔斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adeliza Meschines de Chester于1099年出生在法国諾門迪时，她的父亲Ranulf Meschin30岁，母亲Lucy of Bolingbroke33岁。她和Richard FitzGilbert de Clare至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1128年在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年29岁。

en.lifeSummary: When Adeliza Meschines de Chester was born in 1099, in Normandy, France, her father, Ranulf Meschin, was 30 and her mother, Lucy of Bolingbroke, was 33. She had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Richard FitzGilbert de Clare. She died in 1128, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 29.

fr.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, Unite: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adeliza Meschines de Chester est née en 1099, à Normandie, France, son père, Ranulf Meschin, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lucy of Bolingbroke, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Richard FitzGilbert de Clare. Elle est décédée en 1128, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adeliza Meschines de Chester 1099 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ranulf Meschin 30 und ihre Mutter Lucy of Bolingbroke 33. Sie hatte mit Richard FitzGilbert de Clare mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1128 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

ht.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, Unite: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adeliza Meschines de Chester è nata il nel 1099 nel Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Ranulf Meschin, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lucy of Bolingbroke, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Richard FitzGilbert de Clare. Morì nel 1128, nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adeliza Meschines de Chesterが1099年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Ranulf Meschinは30歳，母Lucy of Bolingbrokeは33歳であった。彼女はRichard FitzGilbert de Clareとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1128年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adeliza Meschines de Chester(이)가 1099년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ranulf Meschin(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy of Bolingbroke(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Richard FitzGilbert de Clare(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1128년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, Unite: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

mn.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, Unite: Abergavenny, Trefynwy, Уэльс, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adeliza Meschines de Chester nasceu em 1099, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Ranulf Meschin, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lucy of Bolingbroke, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Richard FitzGilbert de Clare. Ela faleceu em 1128, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 29 anos.

ro.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, Unite: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adeliza Meschines de Chester родилась в 1099 г. в местности норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Ranulf Meschin было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy of Bolingbroke, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Richard FitzGilbert de Clare. Она умерла в 1128 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adeliza Meschines de Chester nació en 1099, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Ranulf Meschin, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lucy of Bolingbroke, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Richard FitzGilbert de Clare. Murió en 1128, en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años.
